invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3050（基于ATR 13.12和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3050 (based on ATR 13.12 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating overly crowded longs).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破125（基于ATR和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating overly crowded longs).
